source_window_freshness_confidence.source: VM Cloud API probe + local env key-shape check + official Naver Commerce API docs + PlayAuto/Excel reconciliation docs
source_window_freshness_confidence.confidence: high for VM probe result, medium for final coffee readiness because coffee Commerce credentials are missing

success_criteria.token_issue_from_vm: PASS for BIOCOM_STORE_APP_candidate, FAIL for coffee ads-key-shaped candidate

vm_env_key_scan.interpretation: VM Cloud에는 더클린커피 스마트스토어 주문 조회용 커머스API 키가 보이지 않는다.

profiles.label: BIOCOM_STORE_APP_candidate
notes: VM Cloud IP can call Commerce API for this candidate.
Returned products are Biocom products, not TheCleanCoffee products.
One daily changed-status request returned 429 rate limit; detail query for collected IDs succeeded.

profiles.label: NAVER_COFFEE_ADS_KEYS_not_commerce_candidate
notes: The available NAVER_COFFEE_* values have Naver Ads credential shape, not Commerce API client secret shape.

why: VM Cloud has no TheCleanCoffee Commerce API app credential.
The Commerce credential candidate that works from VM returns Biocom product scope.
The NAVER_COFFEE_* values are ad-spend API credentials and cannot sign Commerce API token requests.
current_verdict.remaining_blocker: TheCleanCoffee Commerce API app credential and store scope are missing.

collector_dry_run_design.purpose: Compare TheCleanCoffee SmartStore sales from Naver Commerce API against PlayAuto and Excel without exposing raw order identifiers.
collector_dry_run_design.why_vm_cloud: The VM Cloud IP successfully issued a token for the existing Biocom Commerce candidate, while local MacBook returned IP_NOT_ALLOWED earlier.

no_raw_output_schema.detail_aggregate: orders_distinct_count, detail_rows, gross_amount_krw, status counts, top product buckets
no_raw_output_schema.guardrails: raw identifiers, customer fields, tokens, secrets all zero

steps.name: credential preflight
steps.what: Check presence and shape of TheCleanCoffee Commerce API credential names without printing values.
steps.success: client id and client secret present; token endpoint returns 200 from VM Cloud.

steps.name: changed-status fetch
steps.what: Call last-changed product order list with cursor/pagination.
steps.success: changed_rows and unique product order ids are non-zero with no raw ids printed.

steps.name: detail aggregate
steps.what: Call product-order detail query in memory and aggregate by payment date, status, and product name.
steps.success: gross amount, order count, status counts, and top product buckets are produced without raw buyer/order fields.

steps.name: scope guard
steps.what: Classify returned products as coffee scope or non-coffee scope.
steps.success: Coffee product names dominate; otherwise fail closed and keep PlayAuto warning.

steps.name: reconciliation
steps.what: Compare Naver Commerce aggregate to PlayAuto and Excel for the same KST window.
steps.success: differences are explained or marked as source warning.

collector_dry_run_design.important_design_warning: last-changed-status API is best for incremental collection. For historical weekly reporting, a cache/backfill policy is needed; otherwise old paid orders with no changed event in the queried range can be missed.

cache_policy_when_approved.yellow_future_option: local or VM SQLite cache write only after approval
cache_policy_when_approved.red_never_without_approval: operating DB write or external send
